ref: Jacob told them to say to Esau, вАЬMaster, I am your servant! I have lived with Laban all this time,
text: ∆Жzele b…Ы k…Ы, вАЬB…Ыh…Фha b…Ыhile me menle Yis…Ф k…Ы, medame ye ak…Ыl…Ы Gyek…Фbo, meng…Фle Leeban anwo l…Ф, na nehane a mew…Ф toonwo m…Ф…Ф yeradwu bekez…Ы a.
translated: "The man said, 'I am going to Yis…Ф, to the place where Gyek…Фbo and Leeban live, and I will bring back a message for you from there. It will not be long before you hear it, because I will return quickly.'"

ref: You will live there as a foreigner, but I will be with you and bless you. I will keep my promise to your father Abraham by giving this land to you and your descendants.
text: Duolua az…Ыl…Ы …Ыhye azo ala na me nee w…Ф balua. Mebayila w…Ф, …Фluak…Ы …Ыdaw…Ф nee …Ы bo zo amra y…Ы…Ы mebava az…Ыl…Ы …Ыhye meamaa b…Ы a, na mebali me …Ыw…Фk…Ы ne m…Ф…Ф memb…Фle …Ы ze Ebileham la azo.
translated: The man who is here with us is not the one who was with us before. The one who was with us before, he has gone to the market and will not return until tomorrow, and this one who is with us now, he came from Ebileham.

ref: At that time Isaac was living in the southern part of Canaan near a place called вАЬThe Well of the Living One Who Sees Me.вАЭ
text: Mek…Ы ne anu …Ыnee Ayezeke vi Biy…Ыleehael…Фe fienemgbole ne anu …Ыra, …Фluak…Ы …Ыnee …Фde Keena nyiak…Ы.
translated: Ayezeke is a Biyele-haeloe who lives in the village and his neighbor is Keena.

ref: Since Jacob was in love with Rachel, he answered, вАЬIf you will let me marry Rachel, I'll work seven years for you.вАЭ
text: Gyek…Фbo kulo Relahy…Ыle, yem…Фti …Фhanle k…Ы, вАЬMesonle w…Ф …Ыvol…Ы nsuu na meagya …Ы ra raal…Ы ekyi ne, Relahy…Ыle.вАЭ
translated: The man named Relahyele, who was standing there, said, "My friends, we should not eat the meat and drink the alcohol here, Relahyele."

ref: вАЬI agree to that,вАЭ was Laban's response.
text: Leeban zele ye k…Ы, вАЬ∆Жle kpal…Ы! Y…Ы ye k…Ы m…Ф…Ф w…Фha la.вАЭ
translated: The man said, "Listen carefully! I am going to tell you a story."

ref: When Jacob got up early the next morning, he took the rock that he had used for a pillow and stood it up as a place of worship. Then he poured olive oil on the rock to dedicate it to God,
text: Yem…Фti Gyek…Фbo dwazole nwonlom…Ф mangyee ne ala, …Фvale bol…Ы ne m…Ф…Ф …Фvale …Фz…Фle …Ф ti la …Фkp…Фnlanle ye sika na …Фguale nwole zol…Ы.
translated: The woman Gyekobo has a large farm and a lot of yams, but she does not have enough money to buy salt and yam flour for the yams.

ref: So his father said: вАЬYour home will be far from that fertile land, where dew comes down from the heavens.
text: Akee Ayezeke zele ye k…Ы, вАЬNea o, na az…Ыl…Ы m…Ф…Ф …Ыhwe la azo y…Ы…Ы …Ыbad…Ыnla a, Y…Ы…Ы anwuma …Ыb…Фl…Ы …Ыnr…Ыd…Ф …Ы nwo zo.
translated: The man Ayezeke said, "Oh, it seems that the path to the bush where we usually go for hunting has been blocked by a fallen tree, There are no more animals to hunt there."

ref: At that time the Lord made an agreement with Abram and told him: I will give your descendants the land east of the Shihor River on the border of Egypt as far as the Euphrates River.
text: Na kenle ko ne ∆Рd…Ыnk…Ыma nee Ebilam y…Ыle ngyekyele…Ы. ∆Рd…Ыnk…Ыma zele Ebilam k…Ы, вАЬMeva az…Ыl…Ы …Ыhye memaa …Ы bo zo amra. Az…Ыl…Ы ne vi Yigyibiti …Ыwe…Ыne zo k…Фdwu Azukpole Yufileti ne anloa.
translated: The Denkira people of Ebila are preparing to go to the Azukpole Yufileti festival. The Denkira man from Ebila said, "Let us go to the market early tomorrow. We will meet Yigyibiti there, who is coming from the Azukpole Yufileti festival."

ref: They also captured Abram's nephew Lot, who lived in Sodom. They took him and his possessions and then left.
text: Eza b…Ыhyele L…Ф…Фto, m…Ф…Ф le Ebilam adiema nrenya ne ara nrenya ne, m…Ф…Ф …Ыnee de Sod…Фm la, na b…Ыvale ye nee …Ф nwo niny…Ыne k…Фs…Ф…Фti b…Ыh…Фle.
translated: L…Ф…Фto has come to Ebilam, but he did not bring any food or drink, only a sword from Sodom, and he is threatening people with it.

ref: So everyone gave Jacob their idols and their earrings, and he buried them under the oak tree near Shechem.
text: Yem…Фti b…Ыyeyele b…Ы mmonle m…Ф…Ф b…Ыl…Ы nee b…Ы nzo nu asomade…Ы ne m…Ф amuala b…Ыmanle Gyek…Фbo. Na Gyek…Фbo vunle b…Ы wulale oku baka kpole ne m…Ф…Ф w…Ф Hyik…Ыm kandiba la abo.
translated: The snake has come to our village and it is very dangerous. It has killed many people in Gyek…Фbo. And in Gyek…Фbo, it has been living in the big tree near the river, which is close to Hyik…Ыm's house.
